summary: Frontend-only E2E test of KiloLab marketplace PWA on preview URL https://marketplace-debug-11.preview.emergentagent.com. Tested all critical pages and new features added in this session: AnimatedCounter on stats, Shimmer CTA button, PublicReviews section on landing, TipModal component, updated legal pages (CGU 16 articles, CGV with arbitrage/exclusions, Privacy with RGPD tables, Cookies with sb-token/stripe table), and 600€→2000€ revenue update on /washers and /trouver. All 14 test cases PASSED.

minor.issue: Some 401/403 errors in console (expected for unauthenticated preview env)

passed_tests: Landing page loads: title 'Kilolab France - Le 1er Service de Laverie a Domicile', hero 'Libérez votre temps' visible, CTA 'Confier mon linge' shimmer button, '4.9/5 (500+ avis)' badge, 42 star icons rendered (counters/reviews)
/login page renders with email input, password input, submit button
/signup page renders with email, password, name/text inputs
/new-order page loads order form with steps: Formule (STANDARD 3€/kg), Poids, Localisation, Date, Paiement - shows login prompt for unauthenticated users (expected protected flow)
/washers page contains '2000€/mois' revenue claim, NO '600€' present (verified)
/cgu loads with 16 articles confirmed via h2 headings: '1. Objet et Acceptation' through '16. Droit Applicable et Juridiction', INCLUDING '6. Protection des Washers' and '7. Protection des Clients'
/privacy loads with 2 RGPD tables, sous-traitants and durée de conservation content
/cookies loads with 1 cookies table containing 'sb-*-auth-token' and '__stripe_mid'
PublicReviews section on landing page renders with star icons (33 stars) and 'avis' keyword
TipModal component file exists at /app/src/components/TipModal.tsx and is imported (line 26) and integrated (line 655) in ClientDashboard.tsx
Mobile responsive at 430px viewport: hamburger menu present, hero/CTA/badges all render correctly, public reviews keyword visible at scroll bottom
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: All 16 CGU articles properly numbered with semantic h2 headings
GOOD: 600€ → 2000€/mois update applied on both /washers and /trouver pages
GOOD: Legal pages (CGV, Privacy, Cookies) have proper structured tables for RGPD compliance
GOOD: TipModal correctly imported and integrated alongside RatingModal in ClientDashboard
GOOD: PublicReviews component renders fallback static reviews on landing page
GOOD: Mobile responsive layout works correctly at 430px (iPhone Pro size)
MINOR: A few 401/403 console errors from Supabase on unauthenticated pages - benign for anonymous browsing
test_credentials: None used - all tests anonymous/public per request
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a Vite/React PWA at /app (not /app/frontend). Source at /app/src. Preview URL https://marketplace-debug-11.preview.emergentagent.com works. All public/unauthenticated routes verified. Auth-protected routes (client-dashboard, washer-dashboard, /new-order final step) require Supabase login which cannot be tested without password. TipModal full flow (rate→tip) requires logged-in client with completed order - only static verification done.
